item.title: R to @SciTechera: source: https://interestingengineering.com/innovation/los-alamos-vera-cpu-mission-vision Blog by nvidia: https://blogs.nvidia.com/blog/nvidia-vera-cpu-los-alamos-national-laboratory/
Los Alamos tests NVIDIA Vera CPUs for neXt generation AI supercomputers 👀 The age of Agentic AI for scientific research is just beginning! Los Alamos National Laboratory is building three AI supercom
item.description: pLos Alamos tests NVIDIA Vera CPUs for neXt generation AI supercomputers 👀br /br /The age of Agentic AI for scientific research is just beginning!br /br /&gt; Los Alamos National Laboratory is building three AI supercomputers, Mission, Vision, and Veritas, powered by NVIDIA's Vera CPU and Rubin GPU
